welcome.title: Welcome to Talentiv Learning 👋
welcome.body: Let's walk through the platform together. This quick tour will actually open each page so you can see where everything is. You can replay it anytime from your profile menu.

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.body: This is your home base every time you sign in. It greets you and gathers everything that needs your attention in one place.

my_programs.title: My Programs
my_programs.body: Here are the programs you're enrolled in. Each card shows your progress and a shortcut straight to your next lesson.

curriculum.title: Lessons
curriculum.body: This is the full curriculum. Pick a program to see its phases and sessions — each session has materials, a live class, and exercises.

exercises.title: Hands-on Exercises
exercises.body: Inside every session you'll find graded exercises — SQL queries, quizzes, and more — with instant feedback, hints, and a score.

playground.title: Playground
playground.body: A free practice zone with no grading. Switch between SQL, Python, and the calculators using these tabs, and run everything right in the browser.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: When someone mentions or replies to you in a discussion, it shows up here. The badge counts what's unread.

program_mgmt.title: Program Management
program_mgmt.body: Your console for running programs: manage cohorts, schedule sessions, assign mentors, review students, and track mentor performance.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.body: The platform command center — overview stats, cohorts, analytics, feedback, content reports, and program-manager assignments live in these tabs.

profile.title: Profile & Settings
profile.body: Update your name, switch language, reset your password, and view your certificates. This is also where you can restart this tour.

user.title: Your Menu
user.body: Open this menu anytime for quick links, to replay this walkthrough, or to open the full Feature Guide.

finish.title: You're all set! 🎉
finish.body: That's the tour. For a complete reference of every feature — written like a handbook — open the Feature Guide from your profile menu.

guide.title: Feature Guide
guide.subtitle: A complete handbook for everything available to you.
guide.intro: Welcome to your handbook. This page explains every feature available for your role — what it's for, what you can do with it, and how to get there. Use the list on the left to jump to a section, or take the guided walkthrough to see each page in action.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.body: Your landing page after signing in. It brings together the programs you're enrolled in, your progress through each cohort, your next lesson, and any live sessions still waiting for your feedback — so you always know what to do next.
points: See every program you're enrolled in at a glance
Track your completion progress per cohort
Jump straight to your next unlocked lesson
Respond to feedback prompts for recent live sessions

curriculum.title: Lessons & Sessions
curriculum.body: The full curriculum, organized into phases and sessions. Open a session to read the materials, join or rewatch the live class, and work through its exercises. Lessons unlock on their scheduled dates so the class stays in sync.
points: Browse phases and sessions for each program
Read bilingual (EN/ID) written materials for every session
Join the live Zoom class or watch the recording later
See exactly when upcoming lessons unlock

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.body: Graded, hands-on tasks inside each session — SQL queries, quizzes, multiple-choice, and matching. Submit your answer to get instant test feedback and a score, and reveal hints whenever you get stuck.
points: Practice SQL against a real sample database
Get instant pass/fail feedback on every test case
Reveal step-by-step hints when you're stuck
Earn a score that counts toward your review

playground.title: Playground
playground.body: A no-stakes sandbox to experiment. Run SQL and Python on sample datasets, or use the extra tools — net salary calculator, overtime calculator, XLOOKUP simulator, and OKR builder. Nothing here is graded.
points: Run SQL queries on a live in-browser database
Write and execute Python with pandas and charts
Try HR calculators (net salary, overtime)
Experiment freely — no grading, no limits

discussion.title: Discussion & Notifications
discussion.body: Ask questions and reply to classmates within each session. Mention people with @ to loop them in, and get notified in the bell menu whenever someone responds to you.
points: Post questions and answers under each session
Mention classmates or mentors with @
Get notified when someone replies or mentions you
Keep the whole conversation attached to its lesson
discussion.where: Inside sessions · bell icon in the navbar

feedback.title: Session Feedback
feedback.body: After each live session you'll be prompted to rate the materials, the mentor, and your overall experience. It only takes a moment, and your input directly shapes how future sessions run.
points: Rate materials, mentor, and overall experience
Add written highlights and suggestions
Prompted right from your dashboard after each class
Helps mentors and program managers improve

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.body: Once you complete a program and pass review, your certificate appears in your profile. View it, share the public verification link so anyone can confirm it's genuine, or print it as a PDF.
points: Earn a certificate after completing and passing review
Share a public verification link
Print or export your certificate as a PDF
Keep all your certificates in one place

profile.title: Profile & Settings
profile.body: Manage your account: update your name, switch between English and Indonesian, and reset your password. You can also restart the guided walkthrough here whenever you'd like a refresher.
points: Edit your display name
Switch language between English and Indonesian
Send yourself a password reset link
Replay the onboarding walkthrough

content_editing.title: Content Editing
content_editing.body: As a mentor you can edit lesson materials and exercises directly from the session page. Fix a typo, clarify an explanation, or update an example — changes go live for your cohort immediately.
points: Edit lesson content inline from the session page
Create and adjust exercises and test cases
Keep materials accurate and up to date
Changes apply to your cohort right away

program_management.title: Program Management
program_management.body: Run a program from end to end. Create and configure cohorts, schedule sessions with Zoom links and recordings, assign mentors to each session, and keep the whole timeline organized.
points: Create and configure cohorts and their schedules
Add Zoom links and recordings to each session
Assign mentors to sessions
Monitor mentor performance from feedback data

student_review.title: Student Review
student_review.body: Review each student's progress within a cohort and mark them as pass or fail. Passing a student makes them eligible to receive their certificate for the program.
points: See each student's progress and scores
Mark students as pass or fail
Unlock certificates for students who pass
Keep review notes for your records

admin_console.title: Admin Console
admin_console.body: Platform-wide control in one place. Get an overview of key stats, manage cohorts, dig into exercise and feedback analytics, handle content-issue reports, and assign program managers.
points: See platform-wide stats and recent activity
Manage all cohorts across programs
Review exercise and feedback analytics
Handle content reports and assign program managers

user_management.title: User Management
user_management.body: View everyone on the platform, open an individual user to inspect their activity and progress, and manage roles so the right people have the right access.
points: Browse and search all users
Inspect an individual's activity and progress
Manage roles and access across the platform
Spot inactive or at-risk learners early
